# GEO SOFT-style mouse tissue metadata fixture.
^SAMPLE = GSMMOUSE1
!Sample_title = mouse liver control
!Sample_geo_accession = GSMMOUSE1
!Sample_source_name_ch1 = liver
!Sample_organism_ch1 = Mus musculus
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = tissue: liver
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = strain: C57BL/6J
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = sex: male
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = age: 8 weeks

!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = tissue: liver
